---
params:
 y: NA
 dt_poll: NA
 species: NA
 uk_folname: NA
 eu_folname: NA
 map_yr_uk: NA
 naei_inv: NA
 emep_inv: NA
 v_EMEP_sec: NA
 dt_sec: NA
 time_dim: NA
 emep_version: NA
 uk_agg_schema: NA
 eu_agg_schema: NA
 tp_scheme: NA
 l_fname_uk_sums: NA
 l_uk_maps : NA
 dt_month: NA
title: "EMEP4UK input QAQC document - UK-EIRE input file"
author: "Sam Tomlinson"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"


header-includes: 
 \usepackage{geometry}
 \geometry{top=1cm,left=1cm,bottom=1cm,right=1cm}
 
output:
  pdf_document:
     fig_caption: true
     extra_dependencies: ["threeparttable", "booktabs"]
---
# METADATA

**Project:** NFC

**Git Repo:** https://github.com/oSamTo/EMEP_inputs

**JASMIN dir:** /gws/nopw/j04/ceh_generic/samtom/EMEP_inputs

**Output dir:** `r gsub("/gws/nopw/j04/ceh_generic/samtom/EMEP_inputs/", "", uk_folname)`

**EMEP version:** `r emep_version`

\vspace{\baselineskip}

Input files processed to 0.01$^\circ$ x 0.01$^\circ$ resolution, in WGS84. 

\vspace{\baselineskip}

```{r, message = FALSE, echo = FALSE}

dt <- data.table(Area = c("UK", "Eire", "SEA"),
                 Species = species,
                 Inv_Year = c(naei_inv, emep_inv, "as above"),
				 Emis_Year = c(y, y, "as above"),
				 temp_res = c("annual", "annual", "N/A"),
				 orig_sec = c("SNAP", "GNFR", "N/A"),
				 orig_res = c("1km", "1km", "N/A"),
				 orig_crs = c("BNG", "TM65", "N/A"))

kable(dt, align = "cccccccc", caption = "Metadata of inputs", 
	  booktabs = TRUE)
		 
```

Notes: 

* Emissions from the UK and Eire are processed to consistent sector categories (see 
/data/lookups/EMEP_sectors.csv) and masked to a UK+10km mask. EMEP/CEIP 
emissions take precedence outside of this mask. 

* The 10km strip from the land territory into the sea is combined (UK + Eire) to a 'SEA' ISO 
code, for all sectors.

* Emissions maps are pre-processed from 1km x 1km BNG (UK) and 1km x 1km Irish 
Grid TM65 (Eire) into WGS84 lat lon, at 0.01$^\circ$ x 0.01$^\circ$ resolution. 

  * This is done in /gws/nopw/j04/ceh_generic/inventory_processor

\newpage

# MAP: TOTAL EMISSION ANNUM^-1^

```{r, eval=TRUE, fig.align="center", out.width = "0.7\\linewidth", echo = FALSE, fig.cap = paste0("UK/Eire total ",species," emissions annum-1 (Non-UK/Eire emissions for context).")}
#| fig-pos: "h"
knitr::include_graphics("/gws/nopw/j04/ceh_generic/samtom/EMEP_inputs/outputs/EMEP4UKv5.0/inv2024/UKEIRE/annual/TPannual_allISO/plots/e2022/nox_UKEIRE_2022emis_2022map_2024inv_1_UKTOTMAP.png")
```

\vspace{\baselineskip}

```{r, message = FALSE, echo = FALSE, label = tab-tot}

l_ann_tot <- l_uk_maps$ann_tot_all
s_ann_tot <- rast(l_ann_tot)
s_ann_tot[s_ann_tot == 0] <- NA

dt_tot_emis <- fread(l_fname_uk_sums[["ncoutput"]])

dt1 <- data.table(Area = c("UK", "Eire", "SEA"),
                  Species = species,
 				  Total_kt = c(dt_tot_emis[Area == "GB", round(sum(emis_t_tot_ncoutput, na.rm = T)/1000, 2)],
				               dt_tot_emis[Area == "IE", round(sum(emis_t_tot_ncoutput, na.rm = T)/1000, 2)],
				               dt_tot_emis[Area == "SEA", round(sum(emis_t_tot_ncoutput, na.rm = T)/1000, 2)]),
				  mean_t   = c(round(global(s_ann_tot[[grep("_GB", names(s_ann_tot))]], mean, na.rm=T)[,1], 2),
				               round(global(s_ann_tot[[grep("_IE", names(s_ann_tot))]], mean, na.rm=T)[,1], 2),
					 		   round(global(s_ann_tot[[grep("_SEA", names(s_ann_tot))]], mean, na.rm=T)[,1], 2)),
				  max_t    = c(round(global(s_ann_tot[[grep("_GB", names(s_ann_tot))]], max, na.rm=T)[,1], 2),
				               round(global(s_ann_tot[[grep("_IE", names(s_ann_tot))]], max, na.rm=T)[,1], 2),
					 		   round(global(s_ann_tot[[grep("_SEA", names(s_ann_tot))]], max, na.rm=T)[,1], 2)))
							  
dt2 <- data.table(Area = c("Overall"),
                  Species = species,
 				  Total_kt = dt1[, sum(Total_kt, na.rm=T)],
				  mean_t   = round(global(app(s_ann_tot, sum, na.rm=T), mean, na.rm=T)[,1], 2),
				  max_t    = round(global(app(s_ann_tot, sum, na.rm=T), max, na.rm=T)[,1], 2))

dt <- rbindlist(list(dt1, dt2), use.names = T)

kable(dt, align = "ccc", caption = paste0("Annual emissions of ", species, " per ISO."), 
	  booktabs = TRUE)
```

* N.B. UK and Eire totals in Table 2 are only territorial emissions.

\newpage

# PROCESSING FLOW

The processing in Figure \ref{fig:fig-proc1} shows total emissions as taken 
from the maps (inv_spatial), the inventory table (inv_table), the scaled maps 
(spatial_scaled), and the area aggregated totals using the mask. 

N.B. the map used is not necessarily the same as the emissions year (e.g. MapEire from 2019).

```{r, eval=TRUE, fig.align="center", out.width = "0.6\\linewidth", echo = FALSE, fig.cap = "Emissions processing from source to area-scaled totals.", label = fig-proc1}
#| fig-pos: "h"
knitr::include_graphics("/gws/nopw/j04/ceh_generic/samtom/EMEP_inputs/outputs/EMEP4UKv5.0/inv2024/UKEIRE/annual/TPannual_allISO/plots/e2022/nox_UKEIRE_2022emis_2022map_2024inv_2_UKINVBAR.png")
```

Total `r species` in UK & Eire, processed: `r round(fread(l_fname_uk_sums[["processed"]])[,sum(emis_t_tot_grouped, na.rm=T)/1000],1)` kt. Spatial breakdown :

* UK = `r round(fread(l_fname_uk_sums[["processed"]])[Area == "uk", sum(emis_t_tot_grouped, na.rm=T)/1000], 1)` kt

* Eire = `r round(fread(l_fname_uk_sums[["processed"]])[Area == "ie", sum(emis_t_tot_grouped, na.rm=T)/1000], 1)` kt

* SEA = `r round(fread(l_fname_uk_sums[["processed"]])[Area == "sea", sum(emis_t_tot_grouped, na.rm=T)/1000], 1)` kt

* Outwith 10km = `r round(fread(l_fname_uk_sums[["processed"]])[Area == "ow", sum(emis_t_tot_grouped, na.rm=T)/1000], 1)` kt

Figure \ref{fig:fig-proc2} shows the data progressing to NetCDF inputs - 'outwith' data (data outside 10km buffer) is dropped. 

```{r, eval=TRUE, fig.align="center", out.width = "0.6\\linewidth", echo = FALSE, fig.cap = "Area-scaled toals to NetCDF input data.", label = fig-proc2}
#| fig-pos: "h"
knitr::include_graphics("/gws/nopw/j04/ceh_generic/samtom/EMEP_inputs/outputs/EMEP4UKv5.0/inv2024/UKEIRE/annual/TPannual_allISO/plots/e2022/nox_UKEIRE_2022emis_2022map_2024inv_3_UKNCBAR.png")
```

Emissions coming from processed inventories to NetCDF inputs; 'outwith' emissions (emissions outside 10km sea buffer) are masked and not used for UK/Eire (replaced by EMEP-EU).

\newpage

# EMISSIONS SECTORAL CLASSIFICATIONS

### UK data starts in SNAP sectors, Eire data in GNFR sectors. 

* All UK SNAP03 & SNAP04 goes to B_Industry.

* All UK SNAP08 goes to I_Offroad. 

* All UK SNAP10 goes to K_AgriLivestock. 

```{r, message = FALSE, echo = FALSE}

dt <- dt_sec[,-1]

kable(dt, align = "rcccccl", caption = "Sectoral lookup table, SNAP <--> GNFR", 
	  booktabs = TRUE)
```

\newpage

# MAP: SECTORAL EMISSIONS ANNUM^-1^

### UK and Eire temporal schema: `r time_dim`

Source: `r if(time_dim == "annual"){paste0("EMEP ", emep_version, " schema: data/temporal/EMEP4UK",emep_version,"/")}else{paste0("UKEM ", tp_scheme, " schema: /gws/nopw/j04/ukem/test/sam/ukem_pro/output/")}`

```{r, eval=TRUE, fig.align="center", out.width = "0.85\\linewidth", echo = FALSE, fig.cap = paste0("UK/Eire total ",species," emissions sector-1 annum-1")}
#| fig-pos: "h"
knitr::include_graphics("/gws/nopw/j04/ceh_generic/samtom/EMEP_inputs/outputs/EMEP4UKv5.0/inv2024/UKEIRE/annual/TPannual_allISO/plots/e2022/nox_UKEIRE_2022emis_2022map_2024inv_6_UKANNSECMAP.png")
```

```{r, message = FALSE, echo = FALSE}

dt_out <- fread(l_fname_uk_sums[["ncoutput"]])

dt_long <- dt_out[,list(emis_kt = round(sum(emis_t_tot_ncoutput, na.rm=T)/1000,3)), by = .(Area, sec_name)]
dt_wide <- dcast(dt_long, sec_name~Area, value.var = "emis_kt")
dt_wide[, Total := rowSums(.SD, na.rm=T), .SDcols = c("GB", "IE", "SEA")]
dt_wide <- adorn_totals(dt_wide)
setnames(dt_wide, "sec_name", "Sector")

kable(dt_wide, align = "rccc", caption = paste0(species," emissions per sector per ISO"), 
	  booktabs = TRUE)
```

\newpage

# EMISSIONS MONTH^-1^

### UK and Eire temporal schema: `r time_dim`

Source: `r if(time_dim == "annual"){paste0("EMEP ", emep_version, " schema: data/temporal/EMEP4UK",emep_version,"/")}else{paste0("UKEM ", tp_scheme, " schema: /gws/nopw/j04/ukem/test/sam/ukem_pro/output/")}`

```{r, eval=TRUE, fig.align="center", out.width = "0.6\\linewidth", echo = FALSE, fig.cap = paste0("Emissions of ",species," month-1"), label = "fig-montot"}
#| fig-pos: "h"
knitr::include_graphics("/gws/nopw/j04/ceh_generic/samtom/EMEP_inputs/outputs/EMEP4UKv5.0/inv2024/UKEIRE/annual/TPannual_allISO/plots/e2022/nox_UKEIRE_2022emis_2022map_2024inv_4_UKMONTOTLINE.png")
```

Total monthly emissions of `r species` in UK, Eire and the SEA buffer. 
`r if(time_dim == "annual"){paste0("As annual emissions input into NetCDF, using model profiles.")}`
`r if(time_dim == "month"){paste0("Temporal profiles taken from UKEM")}`

```{r, message = FALSE, echo = FALSE}

dt <- dt_month[,list(emis_kt = round(sum(emis_t, na.rm=T)/1000, 2)), by = .(Area, time)]
dt[, Area := toupper(Area)]
dt_wide <- dcast(dt, Area~time, value.var = "emis_kt")
dt_wide[, Total := rowSums(.SD, na.rm=T), .SDcols = paste0("t",1:12)]
dt_wide <- adorn_totals(dt_wide)

kable(dt_wide, align = "rccccccccccccc", caption = paste0("Total monthly ", species, " emissions"), 
	  booktabs = TRUE)
```

\newpage

# MAP: EMISSIONS MONTH^-1^

```{r, eval=TRUE, fig.align="center", out.width = "0.85\\linewidth", echo = FALSE, fig.cap = paste0("UK/Eire total ",species," emissions month-1")}
#| fig-pos: "h"
knitr::include_graphics("/gws/nopw/j04/ceh_generic/samtom/EMEP_inputs/outputs/EMEP4UKv5.0/inv2024/UKEIRE/annual/TPannual_allISO/plots/e2022/nox_UKEIRE_2022emis_2022map_2024inv_7_UKMONTOTMAP.png")
```

\newpage

# SECTORAL EMISSIONS MONTH^-1^

### UK and Eire temporal schema: `r time_dim`

Source: `r if(time_dim == "annual"){paste0("EMEP ", emep_version, " schema: data/temporal/EMEP4UK",emep_version,"/")}else{paste0("UKEM ", tp_scheme, " schema: /gws/nopw/j04/ukem/test/sam/ukem_pro/output/")}`

```{r, eval=TRUE, fig.align="center", out.width = "0.7\\linewidth", echo = FALSE, fig.cap = paste0("Emissions of ",species," month-1 sector-1")}
#| fig-pos: "h"
knitr::include_graphics("/gws/nopw/j04/ceh_generic/samtom/EMEP_inputs/outputs/EMEP4UKv5.0/inv2024/UKEIRE/annual/TPannual_allISO/plots/e2022/nox_UKEIRE_2022emis_2022map_2024inv_5_UKMONSECLINE.png")
```

N.B. as UK data starts in SNAP sectors & Eire data in GNFR sectors, UK & Eire sectoral monthly emissions are sometimes flat

```{r, message = FALSE, echo = FALSE}

dt <- copy(dt_month)
dt[, Area := toupper(Area)]
dt[, emis_kt := round(emis_t/1000, 3)]
setnames(dt, "sec_name", "Sector")
dt_wide <- dcast(dt, sec_name+Area~time, value.var = "emis_kt")
dt_wide[, Total := rowSums(.SD, na.rm=T), .SDcols = paste0("t",1:12)]
dt_wide <- adorn_totals(dt_wide)

kable(dt_wide, align = "rcccccccccccccc", caption = paste0("Monthly ", species, " emissions per sector per ISO"), 
	  booktabs = TRUE)
```
